useful_conclusions: The Device Farm run emitted complete QPNPU JSON marker pairs for the existing probe/native/Phase 6/Phase 7/Phase 8 flows.
The hosted Hugging Face toy model manifest path worked on the phone: the first Phase 8 run used network download and SHA-256 verification; the later run used cache hits with SHA-256 still verified.
No Phase 9 markers are expected in this upload because Phase 9 had not been built into the APK yet.

The TCP dump is useful only as coarse network evidence because HTTPS payloads are encrypted; the authoritative model-delivery evidence is the app JSON with manifest URL, cache counts, and checksum verification.
This is still a toy model workflow, not Qwen 9B, not NPU/QNN execution, and not a performance claim.
